task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration page of the 'Production-Deploy' job
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins web interface is open, and the configuration page for the 'Production-Deploy' project is visible (verifiable via the breadcrumbs or page title).
The 'Execute concurrent builds if necessary' checkbox is visible on the configuration page and is UNCHECKED.

task_completion.description: Set a quiet period of 120 seconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Quiet period' option is checked/expanded, and the corresponding input field for the number of seconds is set to exactly '120'.

task_completion.description: Enable blocking the build when the upstream project is building
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Block build when upstream project is building' checkbox (often found under Advanced Project Options) is visible and is CHECKED.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the configuration page, or the final screenshot shows the 'Production-Deploy' project dashboard, indicating the settings were successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jenkins web GUI to configure the job
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jenkins web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or directly editing config.xml.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Jenkins application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows a genuine Jenkins environment with standard menus, sidebars, and styling, not a local text editor or mock HTML file.
The breadcrumbs or URL in the browser confirm that the job being configured is exactly 'Production-Deploy', not 'Backend-Build' or any other job.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the Jenkins job 'Production-Deploy'. The required settings are: 1) 'Execute concurrent builds if necessary' must be unchecked (false). 2) 'Quiet period' must be enabled and set to exactly 120 seconds. 3) 'Block build when upstream project is building' must be checked (true). The upstream project context is 'Backend-Build'.
